title: Haryana School Summer Vacation 2026 Dates: Check Latest Update on Haryana CM Announced Summer Holidays for Government, Airforce, Army, Private & Central Schools Amid High Temperature, Heatwaves - The Sunday Guardian
full_text:
Government, private, Army, Air Force, and central schools have announced separate vacation schedules and revised timings to ensure student safety amid rising temperatures.
Haryana School Summer Vacation 2026 Dates: Amid rising temperatures and heatwave conditions across North India, summer vacations have been announced for schools in Haryana. According to the latest updates, government and private schools in the state are expected to remain closed for summer holidays from June 1 to June 30, 2026.
The decision comes as several northern states, including Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, Punjab, and Haryana, revise school schedules due to extreme heat conditions. Authorities have advised schools and parents to follow official notifications for any further extension or changes in reopening dates.
As temperatures continue to rise across Haryana, the state government has taken precautionary measures to protect students from severe heatwave conditions. Reports suggest that the Education Department has issued instructions regarding summer holidays for both government and private schools.
Several schools in NCR regions, including Gurugram and Faridabad, have also revised timings or shifted to morning schedules before the summer break.
The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has warned of intense heatwave conditions in several parts of North India. In response, states including Haryana have either extended holidays or adjusted school timings to ensure student safety.
Authorities have urged parents and students to:
According to multiple reports, Haryana schools are likely to observe a month-long summer break in June 2026. However, any further extension of holidays will depend on weather conditions and government advisories.
Parents and students are eagerly waiting to know whether Haryana school summer vacations will be extended due to the ongoing heatwave. Officials have stated that any decision regarding an extension will depend on weather conditions and IMD heatwave alerts in the coming weeks. Students are advised to regularly check updates issued by the Haryana Education Department and their respective schools.
Before the summer holidays begin, several schools across Haryana have revised their daily schedules due to extreme temperatures. Many institutions shifted classes to early morning hours to protect students from excessive heat exposure during afternoon timings.
During the summer break, health officials and school authorities have advised students to:
Parents are also encouraged to ensure children maintain proper hydration and avoid unnecessary outdoor activities during heatwave conditions.
The Haryana government has announced summer vacations for government schools across the state due to rising temperatures and heatwave conditions. Government schools are expected to remain closed from June 1 to June 30, 2026. Teachers and school staff may receive separate instructions regarding administrative duties during the vacation period.
Students and parents are advised to stay updated through official notifications issued by the Haryana Education Department.
Private schools in Haryana are also expected to follow the summer vacation schedule announced by the state authorities. Several private schools in cities like Gurugram, Faridabad, Panipat, and Hisar had already revised school timings due to extreme heat before the holiday announcement.
Some schools may conduct optional online activities, holiday assignments, or summer camps during the vacation period.
With official permission and authority from Air Headquarters (Air HQ) through the Indian Air Force Education and Cultural Society (IAF E&CS), Air Force Schools in Haryana, including Air Force School Gurugram, are taking their summer vacation from May 14 to June 16, 2026.
Haryana Air Force Schools Summer Vacation started from 10 May to 30 June 2026. The Army Welfare Education Society (AWES) mandates the calendar baseline centrally. Locally, the School Chairman (the military Station Commander) formally grants the holidays, aligning with Haryana Government emergency heatwave safety orders.
Central schools operating in Haryana, including Kendriya Vidyalayas (KVs) and other centrally administered institutions, are also May 8, 2026, to June 16, 2026. However, the Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS) Headquarters in New Delhi decides and grants the summer vacation schedule for every Kendriya Vidyalaya in India.
Parents should regularly check official school notices for exact reopening dates and any changes in the holiday schedule.

title: Haryana Summer Vacation 2026 Latest Update: Schools Across State Likely To Remain Closed Till June 30 Amid Severe Heatwave Conditions, Check Full Holiday Schedule Here - NewsX
full_text:
With rising temperatures and worsening heatwaves, schools in Haryana are likely to be closed for summer vacations from June 1 to 30, 2026. Even though several states like Delhi, Punjab, and Uttar Pradesh are continuing to amend their school calendars due to extreme weather conditions which are affecting both students and staff. Authorities have advised parents to keep checking official notifications issued by the Haryana Education Department so as to stay updated with the last-minute changes in the summer schedule.
Why should Haryana schools close for summer vacation 2026
Haryana schools are closing for summer vacation 2026 after continuous heat warnings by the India Meteorological Department (IMD) were issued for several states in North India. Recently, several places in Haryana have been affected by high temperatures, and there were worries about the students staying in school during the day. Officials have taken this precautionary measure to safeguard students from dehydration and heatstroke.
Several schools in Gurugram, Faridabad, Hisar, Panipat, and the surrounding NCR have already changed operations to a morning start before today’s announcement.
What is the Haryana summer school holiday date
From June 1 to June 30, many public and private schools in Haryana will remain shut.
Both government schools and private schools will be following the Haryana school’s summer break calendar issued by the state authorities.
Schools may then resume on July 1 if the weather improves. As the heat intensity is unpredictable with the continuous alerts from IMD, officials will announce any further extension of holidays.
Will Haryana schools extend summer vacation due to heatwave
Parents and students are closely monitoring whether the state government may decide to extend holidays if temperatures continue to remain high in June.
Authorities have stated that no decision regarding an extension has been taken yet. The Haryana Education Department should be checking the weather conditions before schools resume after break. Officials have requested parents and students not to rely on unverified social media rumours and to check the official notice issued by schools and state government.
What precautions have students been advised during summer break
Health experts are warning the students that continue to stay at home amid the scorching heatwave prevailing in the country, advising them not to go outside for now. Experts also stated it is a huge health risk to expose students to the blazing sun for an extended period of time.
Parents are advised to monitor their families so they can be there if they need to help. Parents should make sure students keep themselves hydrated and avoid going out in the scorching heat.
School administration has advised students and parents to keep in touch with local weather updates.
What is the summer vacation schedule for Haryana private and central schools
Private schools across Haryana are also expected to follow the state government’s vacation schedule. This summer, while institutions may continue online assignments, holiday homework and even summer activities, Kendriya Vidyalayas and other central schools running in Haryana are still operating as per the timetable sent out by Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS), as per existing provisions. The summer vacation in KVs has to continue till 16th June, from 8th May, but the opening date may vary as per the order.
Parents may regularly go through school websites and notifications for any updates to the reopening date, holidays, or extensions.
